notes: Excellent comprehensive index with all six required sections. Metadata complete, topic index contains 17 well-described topics (vs. 5-7 expected), people index detailed with specific contributions, keyword index alphabetized with ~90 terms and helpful context notes, decisions/action items numbered and cross-referenced to topics. Transcript accurately captured—event assignments, top-five shortlist, messaging framework, competitive methodology all correct. High searchability; someone looking for 'KubeCon,' 'Cindy,' or 'messaging' would find relevant info quickly. Entry quality is strong: concise context without verbosity, good balance of specificity. Minor deduction: agent created two identical files (meeting_index.md and meeting_index_1.md) instead of one, indicating minor inefficiency/redundancy. Core deliverable meets and exceeds requirements.
